rulings.Case Title: IN RE: 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 18, 2019 line 1 PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION Notice Of Hearing On Petition is continued to January 9, 2020. Respondent may file a sur-reply limited to addressing purportedly new matter provided in the Reply no later than January 2, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WEISBERG & MILLER VS. HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Elliot Zemel; And Himel Capital, Llc For Good Faith Settlement Determination
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 18, 2019 line 2 DEFENDANT HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC, ELLIOT ZEMEL, HIMEL CAPITAL LLC Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Elliot Zemel; And Himel Capital, Llc For Good Faith Settlement Determination is DENIED without prejudice. While the moving party asserts that it meets Tech-Bilt factors (Motion 2:15-16) no discussion of the factors or facts relevant thereto is provided in the 8-line "Argument" section of the brief. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL

rulings.Case Title: DARRELL TAYLOR VS. GREG FULFORD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 18, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT GREG FULFORD, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint states sufficient facts to support all causes of action alleged against the moving defendants. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DARRELL TAYLOR VS. GREG FULFORD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 18, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT GREG FULFORD, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. JAMES LAWSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 18, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Hearing Required. The Court will conduct an evidentiary hearing regarding condition of the unit. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. PATRICIA MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 18, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT PATRICIA MARTINEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Whether alleged violations are curable and whether they rise to the level of nuisance and waste is an issue of fact, not appropriate for determination on a demurrer. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. PATRICIA MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 18, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT PATRICIA MARTINEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. =(501/CFH)
